title: Open  - 13 April 2026 - Part 153
content:
a debt no one consciously incurred.                                                                                                                       ” (Each time the sky deceived us/ this where longing is sahukar                                                                                                                                           —the creditor—demanding return on                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               “                          Har baar gagan ne vahm diya/ ab ke barkha given structure, always, somewhere above the grief, stands the                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    beyond becoming.

laughter now hold ledger lines of loss. And                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            beyond breath, that what is broken is not it. A language Gaza. Kyiv. Khartoum. Places that once held                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The insistence that what is buried is not hardening against homes, histories interrupted mid-sentence.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           it. Not resurrection as spectacle, but as stance.
